summary: Backend and frontend fully tested. All 12 backend pytest cases pass (stats, estimate variations, batch). Frontend admin page at /admin/name-collision loads, displays dataset status (83,564 first names / 162,251 last names, Ready), and all 3 critical UI flows pass (Daniel Norris metrics, Mike->Michael nickname panel, unknown-name warnings panel).
critical_code_review_comments: router.py has both /import (background) and /import/sync endpoints, with _import_state kept in-memory - acceptable for single-worker dev but would not be shared across workers in multi-worker deploy.
service.py is ~296 lines, data_importer.py and service.py are well-sized and modular. MongoDB _id is excluded in queries via projection - correct.
Input validation via Pydantic with empty string defaults for first/last name is permissive; the service handles missing inputs with warnings rather than 422, which matches spec.
No rate limiting or admin auth on /import endpoint as per user choice (no auth) - acceptable per spec but worth noting for production.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required per user choice
seed_data_creation: None - real data already imported by main agent (92K SSA first-name rows, 162K Census last-name rows, SSA years 1941-2010)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints are stable: /api/name-collision/{stats,estimate,batch,import,import/sync}. Data is already loaded in Mongo (name_collision_meta, first_name_stats, last_name_stats). Tests in /app/backend/tests/test_name_collision.py cover nickname (Mike->Michael), hyphenated (Smith-Jones), initial (J.), missing last name, unknown name, O'Brien apostrophe, MARY caps. Frontend admin page test ids: first-name-input, last-name-input, gender-select, calculate-button, import-data-button, result-panel, estimated-matches-metric, first-name-pop-metric, last-name-pop-metric, risk-level-badge, confidence-penalty-metric, nickname-panel, warnings-panel, first-name-count, last-name-count, import-timestamp, import-status, dataset-status-section.
